probes.label: 01-happy-path
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New-patient intake → SMS concierge → Book consult → Email confirmation
parsed.description: When the new-patient intake form is submitted, wait 2 minutes, then text the patient by name to thank them and collect a preferred time + insurance status. Book them into the next available new-patient consultation and email a confirmation with the clinic address.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, this is Bright Smile Dental 🦷 — thanks so much for reaching out, and no pressure at all. When would you like to come in for your free new-patient consultation? Mornings, afternoons, or evenings work better? Also, quick one: do you have dental insurance (yes / no / not sure)? We'll handle the rest.
steps.exit_when: patient has shared a preferred appointment day/time AND confirmed whether they have insurance (yes, no, or unsure)

extract.preferred_start_iso: ISO-8601 datetime for the patient's preferred appointment start, snapped to the next available slot Mon–Fri 9am–5pm clinic time

args.body: You're all set, {{first_name}} — we've got you booked for your free new-patient consultation on {{preferred_start_iso}}. We just sent a confirmation email with the clinic address. See you soon! 💙 — Bright Smile Dental

args.subject: You're booked with Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks again for reaching out — we can't wait to meet you. Your free new-patient consultation is confirmed for {{preferred_start_iso}}.

What to expect:
• A relaxed 45-minute visit — no pressure, no judgment
• A friendly look at your smile with our modern, gentle tech
• Plenty of time for questions

Clinic address:
Bright Smile Dental
(Please reply to this email if you need our exact address or directions — we'll get it to you right away.)

Insurance on file: {{has_insurance}}

Need to reschedule? Just reply to this email or text us back — we'll make it easy.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile Dental Team

probes.label: 02-adversarial-hallucinatedBlock
probes.prompt: When a new-patient form is submitted, also post a notification to our Slack #leads channel with the contact details.

parsed.error: Slack notifications are not available — no Slack MCP tool or block is installed in this workspace. Options: (1) send the lead alert to your team via email or SMS instead, or (2) install a Slack/webhook integration before wiring this automation.

validation.msg: Slack notifications are not available — no Slack MCP tool or block is installed in this workspace. Options: (1) send the lead alert to your team via email or SMS instead, or (2) install a Slack/webhook integration before wiring this automation.

probes.label: 03-adversarial-vague
probes.prompt: Build an agent that helps with leads.

parsed.name: New Lead Speed-to-Response
parsed.description: When a new lead is captured (contact created via intake form), instantly greet them by email + SMS with a warm, reassuring welcome from Bright Smile Dental, create a deal in the CRM pipeline, and follow up two days later if they haven't booked their free new-patient consultation.

args.subject: Welcome to Bright Smile Dental, {{first_name}} 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks so much for reaching out to Bright Smile Dental — we're glad you're here. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favorite place, so our whole job is to make your visit feel easy, calm, and genuinely painless.

As a new patient, your first consultation is completely free (45 minutes, zero pressure). We'll chat, take a look, and walk you through anything we notice — you decide what happens next.

Whenever you're ready, you can grab a time here: /book/appt_new_patient_consult

If you'd rather just text us back with questions first, that's perfectly fine too.

Talk soon,
The Bright Smile team

Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks for reaching out! Your new-patient consult is on us — no pressure, no sales pitch. Want me to find you a time this week? Just reply with a day that works.

args.subject: Still here whenever you're ready, {{first_name}}
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Just a gentle nudge — your free new-patient consultation is still open whenever you'd like to use it. No pressure at all, and no obligation to book anything further.

If there's something specific you're nervous about, reply to this email and tell us. We'll walk you through exactly what to expect before you ever step in the door.

Book a time here when you're ready: /book/appt_new_patient_consult

Warmly,
The Bright Smile team
Hey {{first_name}}, just checking in from Bright Smile 🦷 Your free consult is still waiting whenever you want it. Want me to text you a couple of open times?

probes.label: 04-adversarial-impossibleCapability
probes.prompt: When a lead submits the form, FedEx them a physical welcome kit.

parsed.error: No MCP tool or installed block supports shipping physical mail via FedEx.

validation.msg: No MCP tool or installed block supports shipping physical mail via FedEx.

probes.label: 05-adversarial-ambiguousRoute
probes.prompt: When a lead submits the form, send them a message. Just one message. Your choice whether SMS or email.

parsed.name: New lead welcome SMS
parsed.description: When a new patient submits the intake form, send a single warm, reassuring SMS welcoming them to Bright Smile Dental.

args.body: Hi {{first_name}}, it's the team at Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks for reaching out — we got your info and we'll be in touch shortly to get you booked. No pressure, no sales pitch, just friendly care. Reply STOP to opt out.

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-1
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New-patient intake → SMS concierge → book consult → email confirmation
parsed.description: When a new patient submits the intake form, wait 2 minutes, then text them by name to thank them and ask about timing. Confirm insurance via SMS, book the next new-patient consultation, and email a confirmation with the clinic address.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 — thanks so much for reaching out, we're glad you did. No pressure at all, just wanted to say hi and help get you in. What days/times tend to work best for you? And just to double-check — do you have dental insurance, or would you like us to walk you through the options?
steps.exit_when: The patient has shared (a) at least one preferred day/time window for their visit AND (b) whether they have dental insurance (yes, no, or unsure). Be warm, reassuring, no sales pressure. If they ask questions, answer briefly and steer gently back to timing + insurance.

extract.preferred_time_iso: The patient's preferred appointment start time as an ISO 8601 datetime in the clinic's local timezone. If they gave a vague window, pick the earliest reasonable slot inside it.

args.subject: You're booked in, {{first_name}} — see you soon at Bright Smile Dental
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

You're all set for your free new-patient consultation at Bright Smile Dental. We're looking forward to meeting you — and we promise, it's a calm, judgment-free visit.

📅 Appointment: New-patient consultation (45 min, complimentary)
🕒 When: {{preferred_time_iso}}
📍 Where: Bright Smile Dental — please reply to this email if you need the exact address or parking info and we'll send it right over.

If anything changes, just reply to this email or text us back — no problem at all.

Talk soon,
The Bright Smile Dental team

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-2
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New-patient intake → SMS thank-you, insurance check, auto-book consult, email confirmation
parsed.description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, wait ~2 minutes, then text the lead by name to thank them and open a short SMS conversation to confirm their preferred time and insurance status. Book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot, then email a warm confirmation with the clinic address.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 👋 Thanks so much for reaching out — we'd love to welcome you in for a free new-patient consultation (no pressure, just a friendly chat and a look around). What day and time usually work best for you? And quick heads-up question: do you currently have dental insurance (yes / no / not sure)? No wrong answer either way.
steps.exit_when: The contact has shared a preferred day/time for their new-patient consultation AND answered whether they have dental insurance (yes, no, or unsure).

extract.preferred_time: ISO-8601 datetime the contact said they'd like to come in, snapped to the next available new-patient consultation slot

args.subject: You're booked, {{firstName}} — see you at Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

You're all set for your free new-patient consultation at Bright Smile Dental — we can't wait to meet you. No needles, no sales pitch, just a warm hello and a look at how we can help.

📍 Clinic address: Bright Smile Dental — please reply to this email if you need the exact street address or directions and we'll send them straight over.

A few things that might help you feel relaxed before your visit:
• The consult is 45 minutes and completely free.
• If you're nervous about the dentist, just tell us at the door — we go at your pace.
• Insurance status on file: {{has_insurance}} (totally fine either way — we'll walk you through options).

If anything changes, just reply to this email or text us back — we'll take care of it.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team

Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New-patient intake → SMS concierge → book consult
parsed.description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, text the patient within 2 minutes to thank them by name, have a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance and pick a time, book them into a new-patient consultation, and email a confirmation with the clinic address.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks for reaching out — we're glad you did. No pressure at all, just wanted to ask: when would you ideally like to come in for your free new-patient consultation? Also, quick one: do you have dental insurance (yes / no / not sure)? We'll take care of everything from there.

args.notes: Auto-booked from new-patient intake. Reason: {{reason_for_visit}}. Insurance: {{has_insurance}}.

args.body: You're all set, {{first_name}} — we've got your new-patient consultation booked. Just sent a confirmation to {{email}} with the clinic address and what to expect. Any questions, just text back. — Bright Smile Dental

args.subject: You're booked — see you soon at Bright Smile Dental 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

You're all set for your free new-patient consultation at Bright Smile Dental. We're looking forward to meeting you and making this feel as easy as possible — no pressure, no surprises.

What to expect:
• A relaxed 45-minute visit
• A gentle look around and a chance to ask any questions

Our address and directions will be in your calendar invite. If anything changes, just reply to this email or text us back and we'll take care of it.

The Bright Smile Team
You're booked, {{first_name}}! 🎉 We just emailed you the details + clinic address. Can't wait to meet you. — Bright Smile Dental

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-5
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New patient speed-to-lead: SMS then book + email confirm
parsed.description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, text the lead within 2 minutes to thank them by name, have a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance and capture preferred time, book them into the next new-patient consultation, then email a confirmation with the clinic address.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks so much for reaching out — we're glad you did. No pressure at all, just wanted to say hi and help get you in for your free new-patient consultation. When would work best for you to come in? Also, quick one: do you have dental insurance, or would you rather we sort that out in person?

extract.preferred_time_iso: The patient's preferred appointment start time, resolved to an ISO 8601 datetime in the clinic's local timezone. If they gave a vague window, pick the earliest reasonable slot inside it.
extract.has_insurance: One of 'yes' | 'no' | 'unsure' based on the patient's reply.

args.subject: You're booked, {{first_name}} — see you soon at Bright Smile Dental
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

You're all set for your free new-patient consultation at Bright Smile Dental on {{preferred_time_iso}}. It's a relaxed 45-minute visit — no drills, no pressure, just a chance to meet the team and talk through what you need.

Where to find us:
Bright Smile Dental
(Our clinic address will be shared here — please reply to this email if you need directions or parking info.)

A few gentle notes:
• If anything changes, just reply to this email or text us back and we'll reschedule, no problem.
• Insurance on file: {{has_insurance}}. If that changes before your visit, let us know and we'll handle the rest.
• Feel free to arrive 5 minutes early so we can get you comfy.

We're really looking forward to meeting you.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team

probes.label: 07-novel-yoga-recovery
probes.prompt: Build me an agent that helps a yoga studio recover members who haven't attended in 60 days, with a discount offer on their third reminder.

parsed.error: Request targets a yoga studio membership-recovery flow, but this workspace is a dental clinic with no membership/attendance data source — there is no event in the installed blocks' produces list (crm, caldiy-booking, formbricks-intake, sms, email) that signals 'member hasn't attended in 60 days', and no tool to query attendance. Cannot build a correct trigger without fabricating an event.

validation.msg: Request targets a yoga studio membership-recovery flow, but this workspace is a dental clinic with no membership/attendance data source — there is no event in the installed blocks' produces list (crm, caldiy-booking, formbricks-intake, sms, email) that signals 'member hasn't attended in 60 days', and no tool to query attendance. Cannot build a correct trigger without fabricating an event.
